title: Staying focused In a Distracted World Is Easy, Actually
description:
Attention spans have collapsed from 2.5 minutes in 2004 to just 47 seconds today and AI is making it worse.

In this video, I break down why your focus is under attack, why it's not a willpower problem, and the exact framework I use to take it back.

Attention is the last real superpower. It shapes your work, your relationships, and your sense of meaning.

00:00 Attention Span Crisis
00:33 The Attention Economy Trap
02:05 47 Second Brain Shift
03:19 Redesign Your Focus System
04:12 Three R Framework
05:52 SOS Deep Focus Training
07:49 Flow State Superpower
10:00 Why Focus Matters Most
10:53 Personal Turning Point
12:21 Final Call to Action
